source_conflict_note: AFC final registration is the squad and spelling source. The AFC technical report plus CFA/JFA official reports determine local dates, results and decisive events; FotMob's Opta feed supplies full lineups, substitutions and cards where official public reports are incomplete. Stoppage time is not added to player minutes, a substitution shown at 90+4 before extra time is normalized to minute 90, and shoot-out goals are excluded. Beijing-date rollover is explanatory only and does not replace Saudi Arabia local match dates.

statuses.meaning: Included in the AFC U17 2026 final registration / china_squad 23-player tournament roster.

Tracked as a youth prospect or dossier/watchlist sample; no final-registration claim.
Entered a pre-tournament standby/candidate list or was later referenced around the squad, but was not in the AFC final 23.

afc_tagged_not_final_squad.note: Pre-tournament 25-player standby/candidate list member; final reporting says he missed the AFC final 23.

latest_public_roster_not_final_squad.note: CFA sources confirm the camp identity and Shandong Luneng Taishan Football School unit, but no public reliable source checked supplies a complete birth date and independently verified registration record. No stable player ID created.

CFA sources confirm the camp identity and Shenzhen Juniors Football Club unit, but no public reliable source checked supplies a complete birth date and independently verified registration record. No stable player ID created.

unmapped_player_audit.policy: Create a stable player ID only when public reliable football sources jointly support a complete birth date, registration affiliation and identity match. Camp-list affiliation alone is not treated as a registration record.

title.zh: 2026 世界杯 U20 年龄段观察

scope_note.zh: 这不是 2026 世界杯最终名单预测，而是按 2026-06-11 开幕日仍未满 20 岁的站内已建档球员整理的年龄段观察池。筛选口径为 birth_date > 2006-06-11，并按中国、日本、韩国、乌兹别克斯坦当前已建档样本分组；中国队已无缘正赛，因此中国组用于同年龄段横向比较。
scope_note.en: This is not a projected final 2026 FIFA World Cup squad. It is an age-band watchlist built from site-archived players who will still be under 20 on the 2026-06-11 opening day. The filter is birth_date > 2006-06-11, grouped across currently archived China PR, Japan, Korea Republic and Uzbekistan samples; China PR did not qualify, so its group is retained only as a same-age benchmark.

note.zh: 中国队未进入 2026 世界杯决赛圈；这组只作为同年龄段样本参考。站内 U20 池覆盖王钰栋、刘诚宇、魏祥鑫、张家鸣、林子皓以及 2009/2010 年龄段国少和留洋样本，便于与参赛亚洲球队的年轻球员储备对照。
note.en: China PR did not reach the 2026 World Cup finals; this group is only a same-age benchmark. The site U20 pool includes Wang Yudong, Liu Chengyu, Wei Xiangxin, Zhang Jiaming, Lin Zihao and 2009/2010 youth or overseas samples for comparison with qualified Asian teams.

note.zh: 日本组按站内已建档 U20 样本整理，横跨 2026 U23 亚洲杯年轻球员、2007 年龄段职业 / 留洋样本，以及 2009/2010 年龄段 U17 亚洲杯名单。高冈伶飒、佐藤龙之介等是更接近成年队视野的样本。
note.en: Japan's group is built from the site's archived U20-age sample, spanning younger 2026 AFC U23 players, 2007-born professional or overseas cases, and the 2009/2010 AFC U17 pool. Rento Takaoka and Ryunosuke Sato are among the more senior-adjacent names.

note.zh: 韩国组按站内 U20 样本整理，包含 2006/2007 年龄段更接近职业队的球员，以及 2009/2010 年龄段 U17 亚洲杯名单。朴胜洙是当前最突出的英格兰梯队留洋样本。
note.en: Korea Republic's group is built from the site U20 sample, including 2006/2007-born players closer to senior football and the 2009/2010 AFC U17 group. Park Seung-soo is the clearest England-based academy overseas case.

note.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦已获得 2026 世界杯正赛资格；站内当前只建档到 2009 年龄段 U17 亚洲杯样本，因此这组更偏长期储备观察，不等同于成年队正赛名单候选。
note.en: Uzbekistan have qualified for the 2026 World Cup finals. The site currently only archives their 2009-born AFC U17 sample, so this group is a longer-term pipeline watch rather than a senior finals-squad projection.

qualification_path.summary: 2025 世少赛亚洲区名额由 2025 U17 亚洲杯产生；中国 U17 小组赛 1 胜 2 负，未进入取得 FIFA U17 世界杯资格的阶段。
qualification_path.final_stage: AFC U17 Asian Cup group stage

china_summary: 截至 2026-05-23，中国 U17 已通过 2026 U17 亚洲杯晋级 2026 世少赛。

qualification_path.route: AFC U17 Asian Cup Saudi Arabia 2026
qualification_path.summary: 中国 U17 通过 2026 U17 亚洲杯取得 2026 FIFA U17 世界杯资格，并在亚洲杯正赛中获得亚军。

competition_lineage.archive_note: 早期世少赛按 U-16 World Championship 命名。
1993 起年龄组改为 U-17，2005 中国档案保留 World Championship 历史名。
2007 起使用 U-17 World Cup 命名。

china_participation_history.note: 1985、1989、1991、1993、2003、2005 均有结构化 archive row；2026 已晋级但赛事尚未开打。逐人 minutes 仍按各参赛档案 minute_status 继续抽取。

scope_note.zh: 按男足 1985 至 2026 各届 FIFA U-16 World Championship、FIFA U-17 World Championship / World Cup 决赛圈整理；2026 这一行表示已经获得资格、赛事尚未开打。
scope_note.en: Compiled edition by edition across the men's finals from the 1985 FIFA U-16 World Championship through the 2026 FIFA U-17 World Cup; the 2026 row indicates qualification, with the tournament still to be played.

format_note.zh: 这里的“韩国”按 Korea Republic / 韩国统计，不含朝鲜。2025 年起赛事扩军到 48 队并改为年度赛制，因此出现 32 强赛阶段。
format_note.en: Korea Republic here refers to South Korea only and excludes DPR Korea. From 2025 onward the tournament expanded to 48 teams and switched to an annual format, which introduced a Round of 32 stage.

headline_takeaways.zh: 日本整体最稳定，2007 年后出勤率明显提高，2025 年再次打进八强。
headline_takeaways.en: Japan have been the most consistent side, qualifying much more regularly after 2007 and reaching the quarter-finals again in 2025.

headline_takeaways.zh: 韩国的峰值同样是八强，2025 年在新赛制下止步 32 强。
headline_takeaways.en: Korea Republic have also peaked at the quarter-finals, then exited in the Round of 32 under the new format in 2025.

headline_takeaways.zh: 中国两次最佳成绩都是八强，分别来自 1985 和 2005；2026 将是自 2005 之后重返世少赛正赛。
headline_takeaways.en: China PR reached the quarter-finals twice, in 1985 and 2005; 2026 will mark their first finals appearance since 2005.

record_legend.zh: 记法：阶段（场次 胜-平-负，进:失）；“未晋级”表示未进入正赛。
record_legend.en: Notation: stage (matches W-D-L, goals for:against); 'Did not qualify' means the team did not reach the finals.
